title: Biomes O'Plenty Renewed
description: Biomes O'Plenty resource pack that improves BOP's original textures, to be modern and better looking, made by King and Ballitos
body:
#
# ![BO'P R Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b99932d8e6a1e0686c69a60821fe5f0e487b4e0.png)
A resource pack that updates the textures of Minecraft's most famous biome mod of all time, Biomes O'Plenty! With the aim of making it look more modern and unique for each block!

<details>
<summary>Updated Textures</summary>

- Dead Wood
- Empyreal Wood
- Fir Wood
- Hellbark Wood
- Jacaranda Wood
- Magic Wood
- Mahogany Wood
- Maple Wood
- Palm Wood
- Pine Wood
- Redwood Wood
- Umbran Wood
- Willow Wood
- Flowers and Plants

</details>




</details>

### Before and After: [Before and after](https://imgsli.com/MjY5OTYx)
